segments.text: Starting with early neutral is the thing
segments.original_text: 最初に触り合いを勝負するっていうのが

segments.text: But reach is still the issue
segments.original_text: やっぱりリーチで負けてる

segments.text: It becomes a tech for Getchu though
segments.original_text: ゲッチ側の対策の一個にはなるんですけど

segments.text: Getchu's out of shield is absolutely insane
segments.original_text: ゲッチ側のガーキャンめっちゃ強いんですよ
これジャンプ温存してるんですけど

segments.text: But they dive in with one move
segments.original_text: 一発で潜り込んでるんですが
上Bがちゃんと仕留めていて
これが理想的な展開ですかね

full_text: Starting with early neutral is the thing But reach is still the issue It becomes a tech for Getchu though Getchu's out of shield is absolutely insane They're saving jump here But they dive in with one move Up B seals it clean That won't reach That's the ideal situation right? Up B meeting up B
